generated_replacement_policy: GPT/Codex may generate owner-approved replacement assets and prototype revisions whenever visual quality requires it. External implementation should use existing production assets by default unless replacement generation is explicitly authorized.
integration_notes: Use sprites/animations/* for placeholder animated units.
Use audio/bgm and audio/sfx WAV files directly.
Use flow/*.png as screen-flow visual references.
Use environment/*_battle_layout_guide.png for safe HUD/combat layout.
Use video/*.mp4 as placeholder videos; replace later only with owner approval.
Generated replacements and prototype revisions must preserve IDs/data references, live under assets/production, and be registered in owner_directed_generated_overrides.

owner_directed_generated_overrides.reason: Battle characters must not include baked handheld weapons; selected weapons are mounted as independent runtime layers.
Owner requested the starter weapon to display as 自动机枪 rather than a base-mounted cannon.
Fallback prototype for weapon_autocannon now uses the same machine-gun silhouette as the handheld weapon.
Owner requested all low-end prototype models, UI-facing prototypes, and simple VFX to be remade to a higher-end 3D mobile-game presentation without changing gameplay logic.
Owner requested all low-end prototype models, UI-facing prototypes, and simple VFX to be remade to a higher-end 3D mobile-game presentation without changing gameplay logic.

Owner specifically called out uncomfortable character firing motion; all fused character/weapon attack frames were regenerated with stronger shot flash, recoil, settle timing, and runtime aim-lock support while preserving existing IDs and paths.

Owner requested 10 new campaign battle backgrounds, one per ten levels, with a more explosive original visual identity instead of the previous city-ruins look.
Generated matching portrait crops and battle layout guides for the 10 new campaign backgrounds.
Owner requested a redesigned high-end rendered app logo; integrated icon keeps the existing project.godot app icon path and App Store 1024x1024 RGB requirement.

Owner approved P0 final-art replacement and top-tier polish for flat UI kit assets with premium dark-metal/glass HUD controls, icons, panels, bars, card frames, slots, and strategy badges.
Owner approved P0 App Store screenshot draft regeneration after UI final-art pass.
Owner approved replacing the 2-second placeholder app preview with a rendered 18-second vertical preview draft from current game screens.
Owner approved P0 replacement for the visible runtime target-lock ring after legacy references were migrated to production assets.

hard_rule: Use existing production assets by default. GPT/Codex may generate owner-approved replacements and prototype revisions when quality requires it; external implementation may do the same only when explicitly authorized. Generated substitutes must preserve IDs/data references and be registered before handoff.

owner_reference_sheet_final_ui_vfx_pass_.quality_bar: owner-provided top-tier rendered UI/VFX reference sheets; PNG bitmap assets only; no SVG/vector
owner_reference_sheet_final_ui_vfx_pass_.notes: Directly cropped and integrated from the two owner reference sheets after review feedback that previous generated assets still read as vector/procedural in runtime.

map_ui_line_polish_2026_07_02.quality_bar: Raster PNG skins, softer glass panels, reduced visible line density, no SVG/vector assets.

final_visual_p0p1_2026_07_02.quality_bar: Raster PNG/MP4 replacements only; no SVG/vector outputs; existing IDs and paths preserved.
